title: Raptor's Camo Creepers X Fresh Animations
body:
## Resource Pack Features
- **Creepers that camoflauge using foliage (Like how it was intended)**
- **Emissive textures**
- **A custom model**
- **Fresh Animations Support**
- **Supports Biomes O' Plenty**

>Install The Main Pack: [Raptor's Camo Creepers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/raptors-camo-creepers)
